name: Nusskipferl (Nut Crecents)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, mix yeast, flour, butter, and egg yolks until a dough forms.
2. Add sour cream and continue mixing until the dough is smooth and well combined. Cover and let rest for 1 hour.
3. For the filling, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
4. Gently fold in nuts, sugar, and vanilla into the beaten egg whites.
5. Roll the dough out to a thickness of 1/8 inch (or 2 mm).
6. Cut rectangles measuring approximately 2 x 3 inches.
7. Spread each rectangle with about 1 teaspoon of filling.
8. Roll up each rectangle jelly roll-style, starting from one end and rolling tightly until complete.
9. Place the rolled dough on greased baking sheets, arranging them to form crescent shapes.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Cool on wire racks and store in airtight tins.
Makes 4 to 5 dozen crepes.
